description: Lists Recycled Checklist (Inspections) in a specified Project. See [Filtering on List Actions](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/filtering-on-list-actions) for information on using the filtering capabilities provided by this endpoint.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the project.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Elements per page

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[inspection_date]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with inspection date within the specified ISO 8601 date range.

parameters.name: filters[inspection_type_id]
parameters.description: Array of Inspection Type IDs. Return item(s) associated with the specified Inspection Type IDs.

parameters.name: filters[inspector_id]
parameters.description: Array of User IDs. Return item(s) where the specified User IDs are inspectors.

parameters.name: filters[template_id]
parameters.description: Array of Checklist Template IDs. Return item(s) associated to the specified Checklist Template IDs.

parameters.name: filters[location_id]
parameters.description: Location ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Location ID or a range of Location IDs.

parameters.name: filters[managed_equipment_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Managed Equipment ID.

parameters.name: filters[point_of_contact_id]
parameters.description: Array of User IDs. Return item(s) where the specified User IDs are the point of contact.

parameters.name: filters[spec_section_id]
parameters.description: Array of Specification Section IDs. Return item(s) associated to the specified Specification Section IDs.

parameters.name: filters[responsible_contractor_id]
parameters.description: Array of Vendor IDs. Return item(s) where the specified Vendor IDs are the responsible contractor.

parameters.name: filters[closed_by_id]
parameters.description: Array of User IDs. Return item(s) closed by the specified User ID.

parameters.name: filters[created_by_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) created by the specified User IDs

parameters.name: filters[status]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified statuses

parameters.name: filters[trade_id]
parameters.description: Trade ID

parameters.name: filters[query]
parameters.description: Return item(s) containing search query

parameters.name: filters[due_at]
parameters.description: Return item(s) due within the specified date range.

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[closed_at]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) closed within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.

list_template_id.description: Checklist Template ID from which this Checklist was created

list_template_name.description: Current name of the Checklist Template from which this Checklist was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Location

closed_at.description: Timestamp of when inspection was closed

current_drawing_revision_ids.description: Array of Current Drawing Revision IDs

default_response_phrasing.description: Conforming/Deficient responses used for items having the default response type

conforming_response.description: Conforming response of the default response set

deficient_response.description: Deficient/Non-conforming response of the default response set

global.description: Boolean flag indicating if the default response phrasing is Procore-provided

deleted.description: Indicates whether this Checklist has been deleted

due_at.description: Timestamp indicating when the Inspection is due

inspection_date.description: Date that the inspection was performed

private.description: Indicates whether this Checklist is private

responsible_contractor.description: Vendor responsible for the work being inspected

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Trade

conforming_item_count.description: Number of Checklist Items with a status of `yes`

deficient_item_count.description: Number of Checklist Items with a status of `no`

not_applicable_item_count.description: Number of Checklist Items with a status of `n/a`

neutral_item_count.description: Number of Checklist Items with a status of `neutral`

inspected_item_count.description: Number of Checklist Items that have been inspected

observations_count.description: Number of Observations from this Checklist

closed_observations_count.description: Number of closed Observations pertaining to the Checklist

item_count.description: Number of Checklist Items within the Checklist
